authors: Salla Tuomola Jaana Hujanen Katja Lehtisaari Juho Ruotsalainen Mikko Grönlund a University of Helsinki
raw_title: At the Crossroads of Fear, Confusion and Hope. COVID-19 News as the Motivator of Affective News Usage and Sense-Making Practices
title_en: At the Crossroads of Fear, Confusion and Hope. COVID-19 News as the Motivator of Affective News Usage and Sense-Making Practices
title_zh: 恐惧、困惑与希望的十字路口：COVID-19新闻作为情感新闻使用与意义建构实践的驱动因素
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们在疫情期间如何通过新闻来应对恐惧、困惑和希望等复杂情感。研究发现，COVID-19新闻不仅提供信息，还激发了人们的情感反应，促使他们以特定方式使用新闻并尝试理解疫情的意义。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how people used news to navigate complex emotions like fear, confusion, and hope during the pandemic. It shows that COVID-19 news triggered emotional responses, which in turn influenced how people consumed news and tried to make sense of the crisis.
research_direction_zh: 探索情感在新闻消费中的作用，特别是在危机时期，以及数字媒体如何影响公众的情感反应和意义建构过程。
research_direction_en: Investigating the role of emotions in news consumption, especially during crises, and how digital media shapes public emotional responses and sense-making processes.
